charity.s: $6M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.06% of revenue) via JetBlue Foundation.

wiki.extract: JetBlue Airways Corporation, stylized as jetBlue, is an American low-cost airline headquartered in Long Island City, in Queens, New York City. Primarily a point-to-point carrier, JetBlue's network features six focus cities including its main hub at New York City's John F. Kennedy International Airport, with destinations across the Americas and Europe. Although not a member of any global airline alliances, JetBlue has codeshare agreements with airlines from Oneworld, SkyTeam, and Star Alliance.

sample.filer: Global Crossing Airlines Group Inc.  (JETBF, JETMF)  (CIK 0001846084)

cases.natureOfSuit: Labor: Family and Medical Leave Act
Civil Rights: Americans with Disabilities - Other

health.s: JetBlue: DOT 2025 ATCR — 71.4% on-time arrivals, 5.78 complaints per 100K passengers, 7.8 mishandled bags per 1K. 1 DOT enforcement action (~$2.0M in penalties). First DOT enforcement action for chronically delayed flights (2024). Highest complaint rate among major US carriers per 2025 ATCR.

recentReleases.title: Puerto Rican Man Pleads Guilty to Damaging Aircraft
recentReleases.snippet:
…uilty today in connection with an incident in which he opened an emergency exit door while aboard a jetblue flight preparing for takeoff from boston to puerto rico.
boston – a puerto rican man pleaded guilty…

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: At 7:00 a.m. on April 24, 2025, an employee tripped in a hallway and fell, landing on her left side. She was hospitalized with injuries to her foot and hip, including a closed fracture to the left femur.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was unloading a baggage cart when they were struck by a baggage cart and got caught between the cart and the wall, resulting in a fractured leg and ankle.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by swinging part of powered vehicle
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was raising a safety rail on a belt loader when her finger was caught in a pinch point. The employee's fingertip was amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was helping to unload bags from an aircraft's cargo compartment when they fell out of the aircraft, resulting in a fracture.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee went to exit a breakroom in a construction area but found that the door was locked. He climbed a wall on another side to exit the area. When he dropped down onto the concrete floor, he suffered a broken foot.
